iti40:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti40:2.1:
“Monks, ignorance precedes the arrival of unskillful qualities;
lack of shame & lack of compunction follow after.
iti40:2.2:
Clear knowing precedes the arrival of skillful qualities;
shame & compunction follow after.”
iti40:3.2: in this world, in the next,
iti40:4.1: And when a person of evil desires
iti40:4.4: and by that he goes to deprivation.
iti40:5.3: a monk giving rise to clear knowing
